headline: Royal Caribbean vs. Carnival: One Cruise Giant Has a Clear Profitability Advantage
summary: Carnival stock is cheaper, but Royal Caribbean's premium brand positioning has translated to better long-term returns.

headline: Why Norwegian Cruise Line Stock Fell 24% in March
summary: The cruise line issued another disappointing earnings report, and the war in Iran weighed on the stock.
